why_this_milestone_exists.purpose: Record the first LLM-generated Kangaroo smoke run after wiring Kangaroo into the LeGPS pipeline.
why_this_milestone_exists.trigger: Kangaroo onboarding was unblocked and the user launched the short smoke run from Terminal.

api_free_followup_check.description: The generated smoke policy was reevaluated locally for 4 episodes and 10000 steps without another LLM call.

interpretation: The Kangaroo pipeline is operational: the LLM generated syntactically valid policy code, CMA-ES ran, result snapshots were written, and the new llm_io audit artifact was saved.
The first Kangaroo policy is not successful. It produced zero reward in both the short 1000-step smoke evaluation and the follow-up 10000-step API-free reevaluation.
This should not be counted as RQ1 success evidence. It is onboarding evidence and an early failure signal for Kangaroo policy quality.
known_limits: There is no Kangaroo-specific logger yet, so feedback to the LLM currently lacks behavioral diagnostics such as ladder reach, vertical progress, deaths, action rates, or fruit collection.

The smoke run used only one outer-loop iteration, four evaluation episodes, four CMA-ES samples, and one CMA-ES generation. It was intentionally cheap and should not be treated as a full budget attempt.
The generated policy used the correct observed index families but still failed to score, so more budget alone may or may not be sufficient.

next_steps.step: Inspect Kangaroo behavior with a short rollout or video before spending a full run budget.
next_steps.why: A zero-score policy needs behavioral diagnosis: whether it is stuck, moving to the wrong ladder, dying, or simply not reaching reward events.

next_steps.step: Add minimal Kangaroo diagnostics if needed: vertical progress, ladder alignment, action rates, deaths, and score events.
next_steps.why: Without logger feedback, later LLM iterations may receive only score=0 and have little basis for targeted repair.

next_steps.step: Run a longer Kangaroo outer-loop attempt only after the failure mode is understood.
next_steps.why: This keeps API spending aligned with thesis evidence quality.
